Formula: Jupiter in Kendra (1st, 4th, 7th, or 10th) from Moon
Effect: Grants intelligence, wisdom, leadership, popularity, respect
Intensity Level: Strong if Moon and Jupiter are both well-placed
Cancellation Conditions: Afflicted or combust Jupiter/Moon weakens the yoga
Interpretive Notes: Strongest when Jupiter is in exaltation or own sign
Astro Tag(s): Raja Yoga, Dhana Yoga, Lunar Yoga
Variations/Subtypes: Gajakesari from Chandra Lagna or Lagna
Chart Examples: Often seen in political or scholarly horoscopes

Formula: Planets (excluding Sun) in 2nd from Moon
Effect: Self-reliant, intelligent, successful by own efforts
Interpretive Notes: One of the Subha Kartari-type yogas

Formula: Planets (excluding Sun) in 12th from Moon
Interpretive Notes: Part of Subha Kartari group; improves mental stability
Chart Examples: Found in charts of dignified professionals

Formula: Planets (excluding Sun) in both 2nd and 12th from Moon
Effect: Powerful, influential, wealthy, respected by government
Cancellation Conditions: No planets on both sides of Moon
Interpretive Notes: This is the strongest of the Subha Kartari yogas

Formula: No planets on either side of Moon and no planets in kendras
Cancellation Conditions: Planets in kendras or in 2nd/12th from Moon cancel it
Interpretive Notes: Most feared among Subha Kartari opposites
Chart Examples: May appear in charts of ascetics or isolated individuals

Formula: Moon and Mars in conjunction or mutual aspect
Effect: Trade success, financial acumen, good for business
Interpretive Notes: Best when in 2nd, 4th, 10th, or 11th houses

Formula: Benefics in 6th, 7th, and 8th from Moon
Interpretive Notes: Higher results if Jupiter or Venus are involved

Formula: Planets in all four kendras from Lagna
Interpretive Notes: Major public success if all planets strong

Formula: Benefics in Upachayas (3rd, 6th, 10th, 11th) from Lagna or Moon
Interpretive Notes: Not strong alone but excellent support yoga

Formula: Moon, Mercury, Venus, Jupiter in Kendras from Lagna
Interpretive Notes: Must occur in kendras to be valid

Formula: Affliction to 2nd and 8th houses (by malefics or nodes)
Strength Conditions: Stronger if Lagna is also weak
Effect: Fear of enemies, suspicion, mental unrest
Cancellation Conditions: Benefics in 2nd or 8th or strong Lagna lord
Interpretive Notes: Not to be judged in isolation; context matters

Formula: Moon in 6th, 8th, or 12th from Jupiter
Strength Conditions: Moon weak, Jupiter also weak or combust
Effect: Wealth rises and falls, instability in life
Intensity Level: Strong if both planets are weak
Cancellation Conditions: Moon and Jupiter in mutual kendras
Interpretive Notes: Often seen in spiritual or fluctuating wealth charts

Formula: Benefic in 10th from Moon or Lagna
Strength Conditions: Benefics should not be combust or afflicted
Effect: Lasting fame, noble reputation, moral strength
Cancellation Conditions: Presence of malefic or combust benefics in 10th
Interpretive Notes: Highly desirable for career and legacy

Formula: Benefics in Kendras and malefics in 6th/8th/12th
Strength Conditions: Strong benefics, weak malefics in dusthanas
Effect: Charitable, famous, happy and luxurious life
Interpretive Notes: One of the desirable yoga combinations

Formula: 4th and 9th lords in mutual kendras and Lagna lord strong
Strength Conditions: Lagna lord must be strong and unafflicted
Effect: Bold, successful in difficult situations, commander-like
Interpretive Notes: Good for political, military roles

Formula: Planet(s) (except Moon) in 2nd from Sun
Interpretive Notes: Enhanced if Mercury, Venus or Jupiter involved

Formula: Planet(s) (except Moon) in 12th from Sun
Interpretive Notes: Often found in disciplined individuals

Formula: Planets (except Moon) in both 2nd and 12th from Sun
Interpretive Notes: Gives worldly sense and flexibility

Formula: Jupiter in Kendra in own or exalted sign
Interpretive Notes: One of the 5 Mahapurusha Yogas

Formula: Venus in Kendra in own or exalted sign
Interpretive Notes: Gives creative brilliance

Formula: Saturn in Kendra in own or exalted sign
Strength Conditions: Saturn strong, not combust or debilitated
Interpretive Notes: Ideal for rulers and hard workers

Formula: Mars in Kendra in own or exalted sign
Interpretive Notes: Favors military and athletic careers

Formula: Mercury in Kendra in own or exalted sign
Interpretive Notes: Great for commerce and writing

Formula: Sun and Mercury conjunction (not within 10°)
Strength Conditions: Mercury must not be within 10° of Sun
Effect: Highly intelligent, respected, surrounded by comforts
Interpretive Notes: Mercury retains power despite proximity to Sun under certain degrees

Formula: For males: Sun, Moon, Lagna in odd signs during day birth; for females: same in even signs during night birth
Strength Conditions: Day or night birth matched with odd/even signs
Effect: Fame, fortune, long life, royal or equal status
Cancellation Conditions: Mismatch in time (day/night) and sign types
Interpretive Notes: Ideal synergy of Sun, Moon, Lagna for fortune

Formula: Benefics in Lagna and in kendras
Strength Conditions: Strong benefics and strong Lagna lord
Interpretive Notes: Strength of Lagna lord is critical

Formula: Lagna lord and 9th lord are benefic, strong, and related
Strength Conditions: Both lords should be strong and unafflicted
Interpretive Notes: Named after goddess Lakshmi—giver of prosperity

Formula: Lord of Navamsa occupied by 10th lord exalted and joins Lagna lord
Cancellation Conditions: Weak Navamsa lord or not in 10th
Interpretive Notes: Also has alternate definition based on Moon and 9th lord

Formula: Exalted Navamsa lord of 2nd, 5th, or 11th lord in conjunction with 9th lord
Effect: Fame, musical and scholarly success, charm
Interpretive Notes: Must be judged independently for 2nd, 5th, and 11th lords
Variations/Subtypes: Three variants depending on which lord qualifies

Formula: Lagna lord exalted; 4th and 10th lords in mutual exchange
Cancellation Conditions: No exchange or weak Lagna lord
Interpretive Notes: Typical of financial controllers or secretaries

Formula: Exalted 7th lord in 10th; 10th lord with 9th lord
Strength Conditions: 7th lord must be exalted; Lagna ideally Sagittarius
Effect: Wealth, divine favor, agreeable nature, family harmony
Cancellation Conditions: Applies only to Sagittarius; conditional for Libra and Cancer
Interpretive Notes: Powerful contact among 7th, 9th, and 10th; confers fame and spiritual grace

Formula: Seven planets in seven contiguous houses from Lagna
Interpretive Notes: Twelve types exist based on starting house

Formula: Seven planets from 2nd house onward
Interpretive Notes: Values wealth over emotional warmth

Formula: Seven planets from 3rd house onward
Interpretive Notes: Grants authority but challenges health

Formula: Seven planets from 4th house
Interpretive Notes: Happiness from home and deeds

Formula: Seven planets from 5th house
Interpretive Notes: Emphasizes dharma and progeny

Formula: Seven planets from 6th house
Interpretive Notes: Indicates struggle due to karma

Formula: Seven planets from 7th house
Interpretive Notes: Charisma-based influence

Formula: Seven planets from 8th house
Interpretive Notes: Challenging domestic and financial life

Formula: Seven planets from 9th house
Interpretive Notes: Combines spiritual and material prosperity

Formula: Seven planets from 10th house
Interpretive Notes: Signifies career strength and virtue

Formula: Seven planets from 11th house
Interpretive Notes: Attracts wealth, success from social circles

Formula: Seven planets from 12th house
Interpretive Notes: May reflect spiritual detachment or fame

Formula: 5th and 6th lords in mutual Kendras and Lagna strong
Signs Involved: Depends on Lagna and planetary lords
Interpretive Notes: This yoga assures a peaceful and fulfilling life when occurring in a strong horoscope

Formula: Lagna lord, Jupiter, and Venus in mutual Kendras; 9th lord strongly placed
Effect: Happy and comfortable life, possible prominence
Cancellation Conditions: Afflictions to 9th lord or Kendras reduce effect
Interpretive Notes: Classical Raja Yoga if 9th lord is also connected with Dharma Trikona

Formula: Navamsa lord of an exalted planet in friendly/exalted sign in Kendra/Trikona; strong Lagna lord
Planets Involved: Exalted planet, Navamsa lord, Lagna lord
Signs Involved: Friendly or exalted signs for relevant lords
Strength Conditions: Strong Lagna lord; Navamsa lord in own/exalted/friendly sign
Effect: Bestows high respect, influence, and fame
Cancellation Conditions: Weak Lagna lord or Navamsa lord
Interpretive Notes: Complex yet powerful; especially influential in political or royal horoscopes

Formula: Ascendant lord's house lord's sign lord in a Kendra/Trikona/exaltation/own sign
Strength Conditions: Needs strength and dignity in every layer of house-sign-lord chain
Effect: Endows happiness, power, and respect from rulers
Cancellation Conditions: If any component is weak or afflicted, result diminishes
Interpretive Notes: A layered yoga, comparable to a compound Raja Yoga with spiritual overtones

Formula: Multiple rare planetary combinations, sometimes confused with Gajakesari
Navamsa Involvement: Usually favorable Navamsa involvement is needed
Effect: Endows the native with nobility, respect, and a philosophical mind
Cancellation Conditions: If benefics are debilitated or afflicted
Interpretive Notes: Should not be confused with Gajakesari; rare in modern charts

Formula: Jupiter and Venus in Kendras in exalted/friendly/own signs
Signs Involved: Own, exaltation, or friendly signs of Jupiter and Venus
Strength Conditions: Both planets must be strong and well-placed
Effect: Makes one an erudite, honored, and respected figure
Cancellation Conditions: Affliction or weakness of either planet
Interpretive Notes: Highly auspicious for scholars, educators, and priests

Formula: Jupiter in Lagna, Venus in 4th, Mercury in 7th, Moon in 10th
Navamsa Involvement: Not explicitly required but strength is implied
Strength Conditions: All planets involved must be unafflicted and strong
Effect: Revered personality, respected universally, indicates divine incarnation
Cancellation Conditions: Any affliction to the planets or deviation from placements
Interpretive Notes: Considered an incarnation-type yoga—very rare and revered

Formula: Combination of strong benefic placements involving Brahma, Vishnu, Shiva principles
Interpretive Notes: Linked with divine guidance and dharmic actions

Formula: Jupiter, Moon and Sun in Lagna, 7th and 2nd respectively
Cancellation Conditions: Affliction to any of the key planets
Interpretive Notes: Strong indicator of royal success

Formula: Planets occupy 2nd, 5th, 8th, 11th houses
Interpretive Notes: Gives stability and resourcefulness

Formula: Planets in 2nd, 3rd, 10th and 11th houses
Interpretive Notes: Signifies foundation and support, like a tortoise shell

Formula: Strong Lagna lord, Jupiter in Kendra, Sun exalted or in own house
Strength Conditions: Lagna lord exalted or well placed
Cancellation Conditions: Affliction to Jupiter or Lagna lord
Interpretive Notes: Represents lordship, Deva qualities

Formula: Benefics in Kendras, Lagna lord in own/exalted sign
Interpretive Notes: Makuta means crown – headship

Formula: Mars and Moon in mutual kendras or trines, Mars exalted
Interpretive Notes: Linked to Durga’s fierce form – great protector

Formula: 6th lord debilitated and 10th lord exalted
Strength Conditions: 10th lord must be in deep exaltation
Intensity Level: Strong if exaltation and debilitation are exact
Cancellation Conditions: If 10th lord is not exalted or 6th not debilitated
Interpretive Notes: Notable impact when 10th lord is in deep exaltation

Formula: 11th lord in deep exaltation joins Venus in a Kendra from Lagna lord
Strength Conditions: 11th lord must be in deep exaltation
Intensity Level: Strong when all planets involved are well-placed
Cancellation Conditions: Weak or afflicted 11th lord or Venus
Interpretive Notes: Good control over wealth, luxury-loving
Chart Examples: Seen in treasurers and patrons of wealth:contentReference[oaicite:1]{index=1}

Formula: 10th lord in a Kama Trikona, Lagna lord and Jupiter associated, Sun exalted, Moon in 9th
Planets Involved: 10th lord, Lagna lord, Jupiter, Sun, Moon
Strength Conditions: Sun should be strong and exalted
Effect: Famous, skilled in fine arts, well-dressed, lives up to 68
Intensity Level: High when all conditions are met
Interpretive Notes: Refers to music, dance, poetry arts mastery

Formula: 5th lord in 9th, 9th lord in 10th, 10th lord in 5th
Intensity Level: Strong if mutual planetary relationships are benefic
Interpretive Notes: Stronger for certain Lagnas like Mesha

Formula: Navamsa lord of 9th lord + 10th lord join 2nd house with 9th lord
Strength Conditions: Navamsa lord must have high Shadbala
Effect: Fortune from many countries, strong, witty, long-lived
Intensity Level: Very strong if Navamsa lord is powerful
Cancellation Conditions: Weak Navamsa lord or malefic in 2nd
Interpretive Notes: Combines Raja and Dhana Yoga features
Astro Tag(s): Vishnu Yoga, Dhana Yoga, Raja Yoga

Formula: Jupiter and Venus in Kendras from 9th and 11th lords; Mercury in Kendra from Lagna or 10th lord
Strength Conditions: Natural benefics must be strong; lagna-dependent exceptions apply
Effect: Highly learned, charitable, enjoys good food, respected by Brahmins, long life
Intensity Level: Strong when all three conditions are met
Cancellation Conditions: Any of the 3 requirements not met
Interpretive Notes: Not fully possible in certain Lagnas like Aries, Cancer, Virgo, Sagittarius

Formula: Lords of 5th and 11th interchange; Moon in 5th
Effect: Fame, king of kings, but may have short life
Interpretive Notes: Not always confers longevity

Formula: Sun in 10th; 10th lord in 3rd with Saturn
Effect: Respected by rulers, famed from age 15+, scholarly
Intensity Level: High if all planets well placed
Cancellation Conditions: Sun not in 10th or no Saturn–10th lord conjunction
Interpretive Notes: Difficult for many Lagnas due to astronomical positions

Formula: Lord of Moon's Navamsa exalted; birth in daytime during waxing Moon
Strength Conditions: Moon must be waxing; daytime birth
Effect: Polished speech, fame, danger from poison in 34th year
Interpretive Notes: Moon-focused; danger prediction is debated

Formula: Strong Jupiter in Moolatrikona with 2nd lord; Lagna lord exalted
Strength Conditions: Jupiter must be in first 13° of Sagittarius
Cancellation Conditions: Jupiter not in Moolatrikona or Lagna lord not exalted
Interpretive Notes: More rare than Gajakesari; periodic in nature

Formula: Moon in Lagna; Mars in 7th; Jupiter in 10th; Saturn in 4th
Interpretive Notes: A unique configuration based on Kendra planets

Formula: Jupiter, Moon, Sun in 1st, 7th, and 2nd houses
Interpretive Notes: Strong indicator of spiritual knowledge

Formula: Ascendant lord in Kendra with 2nd lord and Jupiter in 11th
Effect: Leads to growth and fame of family/clan
Interpretive Notes: Related to lineage prosperity

Formula: All planets occupy 4 contiguous houses from Lagna (e.g., 1st to 4th)
Houses Involved: Any 4 contiguous houses from Lagna or kendras
Strength Conditions: All 7 planets should be in sequence without breaks
Cancellation Conditions: If planets are not in four contiguous houses
Interpretive Notes: Considered a career clue yoga; stronger if involving Kendras

Formula: All planets occupy 4th, 5th, 6th, and 7th houses
Strength Conditions: Planets should be without gap in sequence
Effect: Success in prison/jail admin roles, stern disposition
Cancellation Conditions: If one of the houses is not occupied
Interpretive Notes: Career in confinement-related fields

Formula: All planets occupy 7th, 8th, 9th, and 10th houses
Interpretive Notes: Planets near culmination; may indicate karmic burden

Formula: All planets occupy 10th, 11th, 12th, and 1st houses
Effect: Unhappiness due to spouse and children
Interpretive Notes: Planets about to rise, hence cause disruption

Formula: All planets occupy seven continuous houses from Lagna
Effect: Wealth through trade, ambition, potential fame
Cancellation Conditions: Any house in the sequence unoccupied
Interpretive Notes: Symbolizes a boat—balanced distribution across half-chart

Formula: All planets occupy four contiguous houses from 4th to 7th
Effect: Secretive, builds slowly, often experiences suffering
Interpretive Notes: Represents a fort—obstructive influence on growth

Formula: All planets in seven contiguous houses from 7th to Lagna (reverse arc)
Strength Conditions: Planets must form an unbroken arc
Interpretive Notes: Represents a royal umbrella—indicative of protection

Formula: All planets from 10th to 4th houses (lower arc)
Interpretive Notes: Symbolizes a bow—hidden strength and tension

Formula: Planets placed continuously from 6th to 12th
Cancellation Conditions: If a house is unoccupied in the arc
Interpretive Notes: Represents the crescent—growing strength

Formula: All planets in odd-numbered houses
Effect: Prominence in government or public life
Interpretive Notes: Symbolizes full vitality—odd houses govern dharma and success

Formula: Planets in 1st and 4th OR 7th and 10th houses
Effect: Respected, generous, skilled in arts, brave
Interpretive Notes: Gada means mace—a tool of power and order

Formula: All planets in 1st and 7th houses only
Strength Conditions: Must have full planetary occupation in both houses
Effect: Ups and downs in fortune, frequent instability
Interpretive Notes: Symbolizes a cart—symbolic of movement and uneven ride

Formula: All planets in 4th and 10th houses only
Effect: Restless, fond of travel, often detached from family life
Cancellation Conditions: If any planet not in 4th or 10th
Interpretive Notes: ‘Vihaga’ means bird—symbolizing detachment and flight

Formula: Benefics in 1st and 7th; Malefics in 4th and 10th houses
Strength Conditions: Benefics and malefics must be clearly grouped
Effect: Brave, happy in youth and old age, but troubled in middle life
Cancellation Conditions: If placements are reversed or incomplete
Interpretive Notes: ‘Vajra’ means thunderbolt—sudden bursts of strength and power

Formula: Malefics in 1st and 7th; Benefics in 4th and 10th houses
Strength Conditions: Same as Vajra but reversed placement
Effect: Rich, virtuous, charitable, earns dignity and honor
Interpretive Notes: Yava means barley—linked with prosperity through piety

Formula: All planets in Trikonas (1st, 5th, 9th houses)
Strength Conditions: Each Trikona house must be occupied
Effect: Wise, spiritual, gains wealth through royal association
Interpretive Notes: Sringataka means ‘three-peaked’—symbolizing dharma, wisdom

Formula: Planets in 2nd, 6th, and 10th or 3rd, 7th, 11th or 4th, 8th, 12th
Houses Involved: Any complete triad like Upachayas or Dusthanas
Strength Conditions: All three designated houses fully occupied
Effect: Simple life, may work in agriculture or with animals
Interpretive Notes: Hala means plough—linking to rural and labor themes

Formula: All planets in Kendras (1st, 4th, 7th, 10th)
Interpretive Notes: Kamala means lotus—suggests regal, divine status

Effect Type: Comforts, Wealth through Land or Inheritance
Formula: All planets in Panaphara or Apoklima houses (2, 5, 8, 11) or (3, 6, 9, 12)
Strength Conditions: All planets must occupy one of these 4-house groups
Effect: Owner of land, water bodies, wealth through family
Cancellation Conditions: Planets not contained in 4 matching houses
Interpretive Notes: Vapee means pond—emphasizes beauty and reserves

Formula: All planets in even houses (2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12)
Effect: Lives like a king, famous, rich, owns precious items
Interpretive Notes: Samudra means ocean—vast resources, recognition

Formula: All planets occupy 2 houses
Strength Conditions: Planets evenly distributed across two houses
Effect: Fond of music, polite, wise, creative thinker
Cancellation Conditions: Planets in more than two houses
Page Number: Not found in text, derived from standard lists
Interpretive Notes: Named after the veena—indicates artistic temperament

Formula: All planets occupy 3 houses
Cancellation Conditions: Planets occupy more or fewer than 3 houses
Page Number: Not listed explicitly in Raman’s text
Interpretive Notes: Damini means lightning—represents sudden brilliance

Formula: All planets occupy 4 houses
Effect: Affectionate, attached to family and society, reputation among peers
Interpretive Notes: Pasa means rope or noose—symbolizing binding attachments

Formula: All planets occupy 5 houses
Cancellation Conditions: Planets in more or fewer houses
Page Number: Classical yoga – not numbered in Raman’s book
Interpretive Notes: Kedara means field—focus on simplicity and toil

Formula: All planets occupy 6 houses
Effect: Brave, authoritative, sometimes harsh or cruel
Cancellation Conditions: More or fewer than 6 houses used
Page Number: Not in B.V. Raman’s primary index
Interpretive Notes: Sula means spear—indicates piercing logic or harsh action

Formula: All planets occupy 7 houses
Strength Conditions: No clustering of too many planets in one house
Effect: Dual-minded, skilled in multiple areas, balance between material/spiritual
Cancellation Conditions: Planets in fewer or more than 7 houses
Interpretive Notes: Yuga means pair or era—symbolizes blending of qualities

Formula: All planets occupy all 7 houses (each in separate house)
Strength Conditions: Each planet in its own house
Effect: Restless, less concentrated, struggles with sustained goals
Cancellation Conditions: Overlap of planets in same house
Interpretive Notes: Gola means globe or sphere—symbolizing spread but lack of center

Formula: All planets in movable signs (Aries, Cancer, Libra, Capricorn)
Strength Conditions: All planets strictly in Chara signs
Effect: Traveler, unstable residence, shifting careers, action-oriented
Cancellation Conditions: Any planet in fixed or dual sign
Interpretive Notes: Rajju = Rope; symbolizes movement or swinging conditions in life

Formula: All planets in fixed signs (Taurus, Leo, Scorpio, Aquarius)
Effect: Determined, stubborn, conservative, rarely changes opinion or residence
Cancellation Conditions: Presence of planet(s) in non-fixed signs
Interpretive Notes: Musala = Pestle; steady and powerful, but slow to adapt

Formula: All planets in dual signs (Gemini, Virgo, Sagittarius, Pisces)
Strength Conditions: All planets in dual signs only
Effect: Flexible, talented, capable in multiple fields, social and learned
Interpretive Notes: Nala = Reed; represents adaptability, like reeds swaying with wind

Formula: Benefic planets occupy 2nd and 12th houses from Lagna
Interpretive Notes: Srik means prosperity or Lakshmi—indicates auspicious life

Formula: Malefics occupy 2nd and 12th houses from Lagna
Effect: Cheats others, suffers hardships, antisocial tendencies
Cancellation Conditions: Presence of benefics in 2nd/12th or combustion
Interpretive Notes: Sarpa = snake—deceptive and spiritually binding nature
